items.preparationNotes: Prawns cooked and tossed in BBQ sauce. Inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
items.customerGuidance: Succulent BBQ prawns with a smoky, sweet, or tangy glaze.

items.name: Salmon steak
items.description: A thick cut of salmon, typically grilled, pan-seared, or baked, often seasoned simply to highlight its natural flavor.
items.preparationNotes: Salmon steak cooked to order. Typically seasoned lightly. Check for any accompanying sauces.
items.customerGuidance: Flavorful and flaky salmon steak, rich in Omega-3s. (Values per approx. 6oz/170g serving).

items.name: Vegetable kebabs
items.description: Skewers of assorted fresh vegetables, such as bell peppers, onions, zucchini, cherry tomatoes, and mushrooms, often marinated and grilled or roasted.
items.preparationNotes: Assorted vegetables grilled on skewers. Marinade is typically oil, vinegar and herb based; confirm if specific concerns.
items.customerGuidance: Colorful and healthy grilled vegetable skewers. (Values per 1-2 skewers).

items.name: Grilled Cauliflower Steaks
items.description: Thick-cut slices of cauliflower, seasoned and grilled or roasted until tender-crisp, often served as a vegetarian main course alternative.
items.preparationNotes: Thick slices of cauliflower, seasoned and grilled. Check for any specific sauces served alongside.
items.customerGuidance: A hearty and flavorful plant-based 'steak'. (Values per large steak, approx 150-200g).

items.name: Caesar
items.description: A classic salad of romaine lettuce and croutons dressed with lemon juice (or lime), olive oil, egg, Worcestershire sauce, anchovies, garlic, Dijon mustard, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper.
items.preparationNotes: Traditionally made with romaine lettuce and a creamy dressing containing anchovies and Parmesan cheese. Croutons add a crunchy texture.
items.customerGuidance: A rich and savory classic salad. Not vegetarian due to anchovies in dressing.

items.name: Wedge Salad
items.description: A classic American salad made from a wedge of iceberg lettuce topped with blue cheese dressing, bacon crumbles, tomatoes, and sometimes red onions.
items.preparationNotes: A crisp wedge of iceberg lettuce generously topped with creamy blue cheese dressing and savory bacon.
items.customerGuidance: Crisp and refreshing with a rich, tangy blue cheese dressing and bacon.

items.name: German cucumber salad
items.description: A refreshing salad made with thinly sliced cucumbers, often with dill, and a dressing that can be creamy (with sour cream or yogurt) or vinaigrette-based.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_DAIRY (if made with sour cream/yogurt)
items.preparationNotes: Thinly sliced cucumbers in a tangy dressing. Can be creamy or clear. Check daily preparation for dairy.
items.customerGuidance: Refreshing cucumber salad with dill. Ask if you prefer a non-creamy version (if available).

items.name: Tossed Cobb Salad
items.description: A substantial American garden salad typically made with chopped salad greens, tomato, crisp bacon, grilled or roasted chicken breast, hard-boiled eggs, avocado, chives, Roquefort cheese, and red-wine vinaigrette.
items.preparationNotes: A hearty and flavorful salad with a variety of textures and ingredients, often served as a main course.
items.customerGuidance: A satisfying main-course salad packed with chicken, bacon, egg, avocado, and blue cheese.

items.name: Kansas City BBQ Sauce
items.description: A thick, sweet, and tangy tomato-based barbecue sauce, often with molasses. It's known for its rich flavor and reddish-brown color.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (in Worcestershire or other flavorings)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if certain thickeners or Worcestershire sauce used)
items.preparationNotes: Classic sweet, tangy, and smoky BBQ sauce. Check for anchovies in Worcestershire for vegan suitability.
items.customerGuidance: Rich, sweet, and tangy Kansas City style BBQ sauce.

allItems.name: Stuffed Poblano Peppers with savory rice and beans
allItems.description: Mild poblano peppers roasted and stuffed with a savory mixture of rice, black beans, corn, tomatoes, onions, and spices, often topped with cheese or a vegan alternative.
allItems.preparationNotes: Roasted poblano peppers filled with a flavorful rice, bean, and corn mixture.
allItems.customerGuidance: Flavorful and satisfying stuffed poblano peppers with a savory rice and bean filling.

allItems.name: Cilantro-Lime Rice, fresh and zesty
allItems.description: Fluffy rice (typically long-grain white rice) seasoned with fresh cilantro, lime juice, and often a touch of lime zest and salt. A popular side for Mexican and Southwestern dishes.
allItems.preparationNotes: Rice flavored with fresh cilantro and lime juice.
allItems.customerGuidance: Bright, zesty, and refreshing cilantro-lime rice.

allItems.name: Mexican Rice
allItems.description: Also known as Spanish rice, this is a popular side dish made from white rice cooked in a tomato-based broth with onions, garlic, and various seasonings like cumin and chili powder.
dietaryFlags: VEGAN_OPTION (if vegetable broth and no lard)
allItems.preparationNotes: Rice cooked in a savory tomato broth with onions, garlic, and spices.
allItems.customerGuidance: Flavorful and savory Mexican-style rice. (Nutritional values per serving)

allItems.name: Grilled Vegetables
allItems.description: A medley of seasonal vegetables, such as bell peppers, zucchini, yellow squash, asparagus, and onions, lightly seasoned and grilled to bring out their natural sweetness and smoky flavor.
allItems.preparationNotes: A mix of seasonal vegetables, grilled with simple seasonings. Check for any specific glazes or marinades used.
allItems.customerGuidance: A healthy and flavorful assortment of grilled seasonal vegetables. (Values per 1 cup serving).

allItems.name: Barbacoa
allItems.description: Traditionally, barbacoa refers to meat (often beef, lamb, or goat) slow-cooked until tender, typically seasoned with chilies and spices. In modern Mexican-American cuisine, beef barbacoa often involves beef cheeks or chuck roast slow-cooked with chipotle peppers, cumin, cloves, and other seasonings.
allItems.preparationNotes: Slow-cooked, tender, and flavorful shredded beef seasoned with chilies and spices.
allItems.customerGuidance: Rich, savory, and tender slow-cooked barbacoa beef. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Pork Carnitas
allItems.description: A Mexican dish of pork (often shoulder or butt) slow-cooked until very tender, then typically shredded and crisped up. Seasoned with ingredients like oranges, lime, onion, garlic, and spices.
allItems.preparationNotes: Slow-cooked, tender, and crispy shredded pork with citrus and spice notes.
allItems.customerGuidance: Juicy and flavorful slow-cooked pork carnitas. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Pork Belly
allItems.description: A boneless cut of fatty meat from the belly of a pig. When cooked (e.g., roasted, braised, seared), it's known for its rich flavor, tender meat, and often crispy skin.
allItems.preparationNotes: Rich and succulent pork belly, preparation style varies.
allItems.customerGuidance: Indulgent and flavorful pork belly. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz, can vary significantly)

allItems.name: Flank steak Fajitas
allItems.description: A popular Tex-Mex dish consisting of grilled strips of marinated flank steak, typically served sizzling with sautéed bell peppers and onions. Often accompanied by tortillas, salsa, guacamole, and sour cream.
dietaryFlags: GLUTEN_FREE_OPTION (if served without flour tortillas or with corn tortillas)
allItems.preparationNotes: Grilled marinated flank steak strips with sautéed peppers and onions.
allItems.customerGuidance: Sizzling flank steak fajitas with colorful peppers and onions. (Nutritional values for steak & vegetables, excludes tortillas/sides)

allItems.name: Ground Beef
allItems.description: Seasoned cooked ground beef, often served as a protein option for tacos, bowls, or salads. Seasonings typically include chili powder, cumin, garlic, and onion powder.
allItems.preparationNotes: Seasoned and cooked ground beef.
allItems.customerGuidance: Savory seasoned ground beef. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Chorizo
allItems.description: A type of pork sausage, typically seasoned with paprika, garlic, and other spices. Can be fresh (requiring cooking) or cured (ready to eat). Mexican chorizo is usually fresh and spicy; Spanish chorizo is often smoked and cured.
allItems.preparationNotes: Spicy and savory pork sausage.
allItems.customerGuidance: Flavorful and often spicy chorizo sausage. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 3-4oz)

allItems.name: Mexican Chicken
allItems.description: Cooked chicken seasoned with Mexican-inspired spices like cumin, chili powder, paprika, oregano, garlic, and onion. Often shredded or diced for use in tacos, burritos, salads, or bowls.
allItems.preparationNotes: Flavorfully seasoned cooked chicken with Mexican spices.
allItems.customerGuidance: Tender and savory Mexican-spiced chicken. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Chorizo Queso Dip
allItems.description: A rich and savory melted cheese dip (queso) with spicy chorizo sausage mixed in. Served warm, typically with tortilla chips.
allItems.preparationNotes: Warm, creamy queso dip blended with spicy chorizo sausage.
allItems.customerGuidance: Indulgent and savory queso dip with a kick of chorizo. (Nutritional values per serving of dip, excludes chips)

allItems.name: Queso Dip
allItems.description: A warm, creamy, melted cheese dip, popular in Tex-Mex cuisine. Often made with processed cheese (like Velveeta) or a blend of cheeses (like cheddar, Monterey Jack) mixed with milk or cream, and typically includes chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, green chilies) and sometimes tomatoes, onions, or spices. Served with tortilla chips.
allItems.preparationNotes: Warm, creamy melted cheese dip, often with chilies.
allItems.customerGuidance: Rich and creamy queso dip, perfect for sharing. (Nutritional values per serving of dip, excludes chips)

allItems.name: Beef Birria
allItems.description: A traditional Mexican stew, typically made with goat meat, but beef birria is also very popular. The meat is slow-cooked in a rich, savory broth flavored with various chilies (e.g., guajillo, ancho), garlic, cumin, bay leaves, and other spices. Often served as a stew or as taco filling, with consommé on the side.
allItems.preparationNotes: Tender, slow-cooked beef in a rich and aromatic chili-spiced broth.
allItems.customerGuidance: Deeply savory and tender beef birria, perfect in tacos or as a stew. (Nutritional values per serving of meat)

allItems.name: Cod
allItems.description: A mild, white fish. As a menu item, it's typically cooked by methods like baking, grilling, pan-searing, or frying, and can be seasoned simply or served with various sauces.
allItems.preparationNotes: Cooked cod fillet; preparation method (e.g., baked, grilled) determines final characteristics.
allItems.customerGuidance: Mild and flaky cod, cooked to order. (Nutritional values for plain cooked cod, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Shrimp
allItems.description: Cooked shrimp, often served as a protein add-on or main component. Preparation can vary (e.g., grilled, sautéed, boiled) and may include various seasonings.
allItems.preparationNotes: Cooked shrimp; preparation method determines final characteristics.
allItems.customerGuidance: Succulent cooked shrimp. (Nutritional values for plain cooked shrimp, e.g., 4oz)

allItems.name: Tofu
allItems.description: Soybean curd, a versatile plant-based protein. As a menu item, it's typically prepared in various ways (e.g., grilled, baked, pan-fried, scrambled) and can be seasoned or marinated.
allergenAlerts: POTENTIAL_WHEAT (in some marinades/soy sauces - verify if GF needed)
allItems.preparationNotes: Prepared tofu; specific flavor profile depends on seasoning and cooking method.
allItems.customerGuidance: Versatile plant-based tofu, prepared to order. (Nutritional values for plain cooked tofu, e.g., 4oz, before heavy sauces/marinades)

allItems.name: Roasted Vegetables
allItems.description: A medley of seasonal vegetables roasted with olive oil, salt, pepper, and often herbs, until tender and slightly caramelized.
allItems.preparationNotes: A mix of seasonal vegetables, roasted until tender and flavorful.
allItems.customerGuidance: A delicious and healthy medley of roasted seasonal vegetables.

allItems.name: Escabeche - House-made picked vegetable medley
allItems.description: A Latin American and Mediterranean condiment or side dish of pickled vegetables. This house-made version is a medley, likely featuring carrots, onions, jalapeños, cauliflower, and herbs in a vinegar-based brine.
allItems.preparationNotes: A house-made medley of pickled vegetables in a tangy brine.
allItems.customerGuidance: Our signature house-made pickled vegetable medley, Escabeche. (Nutritional values per small serving)

allItems.name: Refried Beans
allItems.description: A traditional Mexican and Tex-Mex dish of cooked and mashed beans (typically pinto or black beans), fried or baked with ingredients like lard or oil, onions, garlic, and spices.
allItems.preparationNotes: Mashed and cooked beans, seasoned and fried or baked. Specify if vegetarian preparation is needed.
allItems.customerGuidance: Creamy and savory refried beans. (Specify vegetarian if required)

allItems.name: Jalapeno cornbread
allItems.description: Cornbread with the added kick of diced jalapeño peppers, offering a balance of sweet, savory, and spicy flavors. Often includes cheese as well.
allItems.preparationNotes: Cornbread with jalapeños for a spicy kick. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
allItems.customerGuidance: Moist cornbread with a pleasant jalapeño spice. (Values per average slice/muffin).

allItems.name: Mexican Street corn (Elotes)
allItems.description: A popular Mexican street food where grilled or boiled corn on the cob is typically slathered with mayonnaise, cotija cheese, chili powder, lime juice, and sometimes cilantro.
allItems.preparationNotes: Grilled or boiled corn on the cob with a creamy, cheesy, and spicy topping.
allItems.customerGuidance: Authentic Mexican street corn: sweet, savory, spicy, and tangy all in one.

allItems.name: Rice and Beans
allItems.description: A staple dish in many cultures, typically consisting of cooked rice served with cooked beans (e.g., black beans, pinto beans, kidney beans). Seasonings and preparation methods vary widely by region.
allItems.preparationNotes: A combination of cooked rice and beans; preparation style varies.
allItems.customerGuidance: A hearty and nutritious serving of rice and beans. (Nutritional values per serving)

allItems.name: Mexican Slaw with Mango
allItems.description: A refreshing and crunchy slaw with a Mexican twist, typically featuring shredded cabbage, carrots, red onion, fresh cilantro, sweet mango, and a zesty lime-based dressing, often with a hint of spice.
allItems.preparationNotes: Crunchy cabbage slaw with sweet mango, cilantro, and a tangy lime dressing.
allItems.customerGuidance: A vibrant Mexican-style slaw with the sweetness of mango and a zesty lime kick.

allItems.name: Vegetarian Empanadas
allItems.description: Savory turnovers made with pastry dough and filled with a vegetarian mixture, which can include ingredients like spiced potatoes, peas, corn, cheese, spinach, mushrooms, or lentils. Baked or fried.

allItems.preparationNotes: Pastry turnovers with a savory vegetarian filling; filling specifics vary.
allItems.customerGuidance: Delicious vegetarian empanadas with a savory filling. Inquire for today's filling. (Nutritional values per empanada)

allItems.name: Classic Pico de Gallo
allItems.description: A fresh, uncooked salsa made from chopped tomatoes, onions, serrano or jalapeño peppers, cilantro, salt, and lime juice. Also known as salsa fresca or salsa cruda.
allItems.preparationNotes: A simple, fresh salsa of chopped tomatoes, onions, peppers, cilantro, and lime.
allItems.customerGuidance: Freshly made classic pico de gallo. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

allItems.name: Fresh Mango Salsa
allItems.description: A sweet and savory salsa made with diced fresh mango, red onion, jalapeño or bell pepper, cilantro, and lime juice. Great with grilled fish, chicken, or chips.
allItems.preparationNotes: A vibrant salsa combining sweet mango with onion, pepper, cilantro, and lime.
allItems.customerGuidance: Sweet, tangy, and refreshing fresh mango salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

allItems.name: Pineapple Habanero Salsa
allItems.description: A fiery and fruity salsa that balances the sweetness of pineapple with the intense heat of habanero peppers, often with red onion, cilantro, and lime juice.
allItems.preparationNotes: A very spicy and fruity salsa with pineapple and habanero peppers.
allItems.customerGuidance: Intensely spicy and sweet pineapple habanero salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

allItems.name: Cucumber & Apple Salsa
allItems.description: A crisp and refreshing salsa made with diced cucumber and apple, often with red onion, cilantro or mint, lime or lemon juice, and a touch of jalapeño for mild heat.
allItems.preparationNotes: A cool and crisp salsa with cucumber, apple, and fresh herbs.
allItems.customerGuidance: A uniquely refreshing cucumber and apple salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

allItems.name: Salsa Roja (red sauce)
allItems.description: A general term for a red salsa typically made from cooked or roasted tomatoes, chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, serranos, or dried chilies like guajillo), onion, garlic, cilantro, and lime juice. Texture can range from chunky to smooth.
allItems.preparationNotes: A classic red salsa made with tomatoes, chili peppers, onion, garlic, and cilantro.
allItems.customerGuidance: Our house salsa roja, a flavorful red salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

allItems.name: Salsa Verde (green sauce)
allItems.description: A tangy green salsa typically made from tomatillos, green chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, serranos), onion, garlic, cilantro, and lime juice. Can be cooked or raw.
allItems.preparationNotes: A classic green salsa made with tomatillos, green chilies, onion, garlic, and cilantro.

items.description: A mild, white fish. As a menu item, it's typically cooked by methods like baking, grilling, pan-searing, or frying, and can be seasoned simply or served with various sauces.
items.preparationNotes: Cooked cod fillet; preparation method (e.g., baked, grilled) determines final characteristics.
items.customerGuidance: Mild and flaky cod, cooked to order. (Nutritional values for plain cooked cod, e.g., 4oz)

items.name: Shrimp
items.description: Cooked shrimp, often served as a protein add-on or main component. Preparation can vary (e.g., grilled, sautéed, boiled) and may include various seasonings.
items.preparationNotes: Cooked shrimp; preparation method determines final characteristics.
items.customerGuidance: Succulent cooked shrimp. (Nutritional values for plain cooked shrimp, e.g., 4oz)

items.name: Tofu
items.description: Soybean curd, a versatile plant-based protein. As a menu item, it's typically prepared in various ways (e.g., grilled, baked, pan-fried, scrambled) and can be seasoned or marinated.
allergenAlerts: POTENTIAL_WHEAT (in some marinades/soy sauces - verify if GF needed)
items.preparationNotes: Prepared tofu; specific flavor profile depends on seasoning and cooking method.
items.customerGuidance: Versatile plant-based tofu, prepared to order. (Nutritional values for plain cooked tofu, e.g., 4oz, before heavy sauces/marinades)

items.name: Roasted Vegetables
items.description: A medley of seasonal vegetables roasted with olive oil, salt, pepper, and often herbs, until tender and slightly caramelized.
items.preparationNotes: A mix of seasonal vegetables, roasted until tender and flavorful.
items.customerGuidance: A delicious and healthy medley of roasted seasonal vegetables.

items.name: Escabeche - House-made picked vegetable medley
items.description: A Latin American and Mediterranean condiment or side dish of pickled vegetables. This house-made version is a medley, likely featuring carrots, onions, jalapeños, cauliflower, and herbs in a vinegar-based brine.
items.preparationNotes: A house-made medley of pickled vegetables in a tangy brine.
items.customerGuidance: Our signature house-made pickled vegetable medley, Escabeche. (Nutritional values per small serving)

items.name: Refried Beans
items.description: A traditional Mexican and Tex-Mex dish of cooked and mashed beans (typically pinto or black beans), fried or baked with ingredients like lard or oil, onions, garlic, and spices.
items.preparationNotes: Mashed and cooked beans, seasoned and fried or baked. Specify if vegetarian preparation is needed.
items.customerGuidance: Creamy and savory refried beans. (Specify vegetarian if required)

items.name: Jalapeno cornbread
items.description: Cornbread with the added kick of diced jalapeño peppers, offering a balance of sweet, savory, and spicy flavors. Often includes cheese as well.
items.preparationNotes: Cornbread with jalapeños for a spicy kick. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
items.customerGuidance: Moist cornbread with a pleasant jalapeño spice. (Values per average slice/muffin).

items.name: Mexican Street corn (Elotes)
items.description: A popular Mexican street food where grilled or boiled corn on the cob is typically slathered with mayonnaise, cotija cheese, chili powder, lime juice, and sometimes cilantro.
items.preparationNotes: Grilled or boiled corn on the cob with a creamy, cheesy, and spicy topping.
items.customerGuidance: Authentic Mexican street corn: sweet, savory, spicy, and tangy all in one.

items.name: Rice and Beans
items.description: A staple dish in many cultures, typically consisting of cooked rice served with cooked beans (e.g., black beans, pinto beans, kidney beans). Seasonings and preparation methods vary widely by region.
items.preparationNotes: A combination of cooked rice and beans; preparation style varies.
items.customerGuidance: A hearty and nutritious serving of rice and beans. (Nutritional values per serving)

items.name: Mexican Slaw with Mango
items.description: A refreshing and crunchy slaw with a Mexican twist, typically featuring shredded cabbage, carrots, red onion, fresh cilantro, sweet mango, and a zesty lime-based dressing, often with a hint of spice.
items.preparationNotes: Crunchy cabbage slaw with sweet mango, cilantro, and a tangy lime dressing.
items.customerGuidance: A vibrant Mexican-style slaw with the sweetness of mango and a zesty lime kick.

items.name: Vegetarian Empanadas
items.description: Savory turnovers made with pastry dough and filled with a vegetarian mixture, which can include ingredients like spiced potatoes, peas, corn, cheese, spinach, mushrooms, or lentils. Baked or fried.
allergenAlerts: POTENTIAL_EGG (if used in dough or as wash)
items.preparationNotes: Pastry turnovers with a savory vegetarian filling; filling specifics vary.
items.customerGuidance: Delicious vegetarian empanadas with a savory filling. Inquire for today's filling. (Nutritional values per empanada)

items.name: Classic Pico de Gallo
items.description: A fresh, uncooked salsa made from chopped tomatoes, onions, serrano or jalapeño peppers, cilantro, salt, and lime juice. Also known as salsa fresca or salsa cruda.
items.preparationNotes: A simple, fresh salsa of chopped tomatoes, onions, peppers, cilantro, and lime.
items.customerGuidance: Freshly made classic pico de gallo. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Fresh Mango Salsa
items.description: A sweet and savory salsa made with diced fresh mango, red onion, jalapeño or bell pepper, cilantro, and lime juice. Great with grilled fish, chicken, or chips.
items.preparationNotes: A vibrant salsa combining sweet mango with onion, pepper, cilantro, and lime.
items.customerGuidance: Sweet, tangy, and refreshing fresh mango salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Pineapple Habanero Salsa
items.description: A fiery and fruity salsa that balances the sweetness of pineapple with the intense heat of habanero peppers, often with red onion, cilantro, and lime juice.
items.preparationNotes: A very spicy and fruity salsa with pineapple and habanero peppers.
items.customerGuidance: Intensely spicy and sweet pineapple habanero salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Cucumber & Apple Salsa
items.description: A crisp and refreshing salsa made with diced cucumber and apple, often with red onion, cilantro or mint, lime or lemon juice, and a touch of jalapeño for mild heat.
items.preparationNotes: A cool and crisp salsa with cucumber, apple, and fresh herbs.
items.customerGuidance: A uniquely refreshing cucumber and apple salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Salsa Roja (red sauce)
items.description: A general term for a red salsa typically made from cooked or roasted tomatoes, chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, serranos, or dried chilies like guajillo), onion, garlic, cilantro, and lime juice. Texture can range from chunky to smooth.
items.preparationNotes: A classic red salsa made with tomatoes, chili peppers, onion, garlic, and cilantro.
items.customerGuidance: Our house salsa roja, a flavorful red salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Salsa Verde (green sauce)
items.description: A tangy green salsa typically made from tomatillos, green chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, serranos), onion, garlic, cilantro, and lime juice. Can be cooked or raw.
items.preparationNotes: A classic green salsa made with tomatillos, green chilies, onion, garlic, and cilantro.
items.customerGuidance: Our house salsa verde, a tangy and flavorful green salsa. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Creamy Salsa Verde (green sauce)
items.description: A variation of salsa verde that has a creamy texture, often achieved by adding avocado, sour cream, Mexican crema, or by emulsifying oil into the traditional salsa verde ingredients.
items.preparationNotes: A tangy green salsa with an added creamy texture.
items.customerGuidance: Our creamy salsa verde, a smooth and tangy green sauce. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Shredded cheese
items.description: Shredded cheese, typically a blend like Monterey Jack and Cheddar, or a specific type like Cotija, offered as a topping or accompaniment.
items.preparationNotes: Shredded cheese for topping.
items.customerGuidance: A serving of shredded cheese. (Nutritional values per 2 tbsp / 0.5 oz serving)

items.name: Diced Onions
items.description: Freshly diced onions (typically white, yellow, or red) offered as a topping or condiment.
items.preparationNotes: Freshly diced onions.
items.customerGuidance: A serving of diced onions. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Jalapeños
items.description: Jalapeño peppers, typically sliced or diced, offered as a spicy topping or condiment. Can be fresh or pickled.
items.preparationNotes: Sliced or diced jalapeño peppers.
items.customerGuidance: A serving of jalapeños for a spicy kick. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Sour Cream
items.description: Cultured cream with a characteristically sour taste, used as a condiment or topping, especially in Mexican, Eastern European, and American cuisines.
items.preparationNotes: Cultured sour cream.
items.customerGuidance: A dollop of cool and tangy sour cream. (Nutritional values per tablespoon)

items.name: Pickled cabbage
items.description: Cabbage (often red or green) that has been pickled in a brine of vinegar, water, salt, and sometimes sugar and spices. Offers a tangy and crunchy element.
items.preparationNotes: Tangy and crunchy pickled cabbage.
items.customerGuidance: A serving of tangy pickled cabbage. (Nutritional values per 2 tablespoons)

items.name: Shredded vegan cheese
items.description: Shredded plant-based cheese alternative, typically made from ingredients like soy, nuts (cashews, almonds), coconut oil, or starches. Offered as a dairy-free topping.
items.preparationNotes: Shredded vegan cheese alternative for topping.
items.customerGuidance: A serving of shredded vegan cheese. Please inquire about brand/allergens. (Nutritional values per 2 tbsp / 0.5 oz serving, varies by brand)

items.name: Lime wedges
items.description: Fresh lime wedges offered as a garnish or for squeezing over dishes to add acidity and brightness.
items.preparationNotes: Fresh lime wedges.
items.customerGuidance: Fresh lime wedges for added zest. (Nutritional values per wedge)

items.name: Sliced radish
items.description: Thinly sliced fresh radishes, offering a crisp texture and peppery bite. Used as a garnish or topping.
items.preparationNotes: Freshly sliced radishes.
items.customerGuidance: Crisp and peppery sliced radishes. (Nutritional values per few slices)

items.name: Diced bell peppers
items.description: Freshly diced bell peppers (often a mix of colors like green, red, yellow, orange) offered as a topping or ingredient.
items.preparationNotes: Freshly diced bell peppers.
items.customerGuidance: A serving of crisp, diced bell peppers. (Nutritional values per 2 tablespoons)

items.name: Fire roasted bell peppers
items.description: Bell peppers (various colors) that have been charred over an open flame or under a broiler, then peeled, resulting in a smoky flavor and tender texture. Often sliced or diced.
items.preparationNotes: Bell peppers roasted over an open flame for a smoky flavor.
items.customerGuidance: Smoky and tender fire-roasted bell peppers. (Nutritional values per 1/4 cup serving)

items.name: Guacamole
items.description: An avocado-based dip or spread, traditionally made by mashing ripe avocados with salt. Modern versions often include lime juice, cilantro, onions, and jalapeños or serranos.
items.preparationNotes: Creamy mashed avocado dip with lime, onion, cilantro, and peppers.
items.customerGuidance: Freshly made creamy guacamole. (Nutritional values per 2 tablespoons)

items.name: Cilantro
items.description: Fresh cilantro (coriander leaves), typically chopped, used as a fresh herb garnish or topping for its bright, citrusy, and slightly peppery flavor.
items.preparationNotes: Freshly chopped cilantro.
items.customerGuidance: A sprinkle of fresh cilantro. (Nutritional values negligible for typical garnish amount)

allItems.name: Papoutsakia - Classic moussaka in individual hollowed eggplant shells with seasoned ground beef and topped with creamy bechamel
allItems.description: A traditional Greek dish, 'Papoutsakia' means 'little shoes'. It consists of baked eggplant halves stuffed with a savory ground meat (typically beef or lamb) and tomato sauce, then topped with a creamy béchamel sauce and baked until golden.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (milk, butter, cheese in béchamel and topping)
allItems.preparationNotes: Baked stuffed eggplants with seasoned ground meat and a rich béchamel topping, similar to individual moussakas.
allItems.customerGuidance: Delicious Greek 'little shoes' – savory meat-stuffed eggplants topped with creamy béchamel.

allItems.name: Soutzoukakia - Plump oblong-shaped meatballs are packed with loads of aromatics and fresh herbs, smothered in a cinnamon wine-enhanced tomato sauce
allItems.description: Soutzoukakia Smyrneika are Greek baked meatballs from Smyrna, characterized by their oblong shape and rich, aromatic tomato sauce flavored with cumin, cinnamon, and wine.
allItems.preparationNotes: Aromatic, oblong meatballs baked in a rich tomato sauce spiced with cumin and cinnamon.
allItems.customerGuidance: Flavorful Greek meatballs in a unique cinnamon and wine-infused tomato sauce.

allItems.name: Kokinisto - Boneless short rib slowly cooked in cinnamon-scented tomato sauce
allItems.description: A traditional Greek comfort dish, Kokinisto features tender boneless beef short ribs braised slowly in a rich, aromatic tomato sauce, characteristically scented with cinnamon, cloves, and other warm spices.
allItems.preparationNotes: Beef short ribs slow-cooked until meltingly tender in a cinnamon-spiced tomato sauce. Typically served over rice, pasta, or potatoes.
allItems.customerGuidance: Tender, aromatic short ribs in a classic Greek cinnamon-tomato sauce.

allItems.name: Kleftiko - (Family style only) Boldly seasoned lamb roast that cooks with new potatoes, celery, and carrots, low and slow for 6 hours, in a parchment paper pouch
allItems.description: A traditional Greek celebratory lamb dish. Lamb (often leg or shoulder) is boldly seasoned with garlic, oregano, and lemon, then slow-roasted for hours in a parchment paper pouch along with new potatoes, celery, and carrots, sealing in all the juices and flavors.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (potentially, if feta cheese is included, please inquire)
allItems.preparationNotes: Lamb slow-roasted in parchment paper with potatoes and vegetables for exceptional tenderness. Served family style. Inquire if feta cheese is part of this specific recipe.
suitableForDiets: PALEO_FRIENDLY (if no cheese and specific preparation)
allItems.customerGuidance: Succulent, slow-cooked lamb and vegetables, bursting with flavor. Perfect for sharing.

allItems.name: Pastitsio - Classic baked pasta dish with cinnamon-scented ground meat and creamy béchamel sauce
allItems.description: A beloved Greek baked pasta casserole. Pastitsio features layers of long tubular pasta (like bucatini or special Pastitsio pasta), a rich, cinnamon-spiced ground meat sauce (typically beef or a mix), and is topped with a thick, creamy béchamel sauce and often a sprinkle of cheese.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if wine is used in meat sauce)
allItems.preparationNotes: A hearty layered baked pasta dish with spiced meat sauce and creamy béchamel. Contains wheat, dairy, and egg.
allItems.customerGuidance: The ultimate Greek comfort food – rich, creamy, and satisfying.

allItems.name: Kotopoulo lemonato - Aromatic and lemony baked chicken with fresh herbs
allItems.description: A classic Greek dish of tender chicken pieces (often bone-in, skin-on) baked until golden with a vibrant, aromatic sauce of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, and other fresh herbs. Potatoes are often roasted alongside the chicken.
allItems.preparationNotes: Chicken baked with a zesty lemon, garlic, and herb sauce. Often served with roasted potatoes cooked in the same pan.
suitableForDiets: PALEO_FRIENDLY (if no/minimal added sugar in broth if used)
allItems.customerGuidance: Bright, flavorful, and tender lemon-herb baked chicken.

allItems.name: Paidakia - These Greek lamb chops are marinated in a mix of olive oil, lemon juice, garlic and oregano and grilled to perfection
allItems.description: Paidakia are succulent Greek-style lamb chops, typically marinated in a classic mixture of extra virgin olive oil, fresh lemon juice, minced garlic, and dried oregano, then grilled over high heat to achieve a flavorful char and tender interior.
allItems.preparationNotes: Lamb chops marinated in olive oil, lemon, garlic, and oregano, then grilled. Cooked to order.
allItems.customerGuidance: Classic Greek grilled lamb chops – intensely flavorful and tender.

allItems.name: Kotsi Arni - Slowly roasted lamb shank with tomato, herbs and robust spices such as cinnamon and clove
allItems.description: A hearty Greek dish of lamb shanks (Kotsi Arni) slowly roasted or braised until fall-off-the-bone tender in a rich sauce, often tomato-based, and flavored with herbs and robust warm spices like cinnamon and cloves.
allItems.preparationNotes: Lamb shanks slow-cooked in a tomato and spice-infused sauce until exceptionally tender. Often served with orzo, mashed potatoes, or rice.
allItems.customerGuidance: Fork-tender lamb shanks in a rich, aromatic Greek-style sauce.

allItems.name: Bifteki Gemisto - Aromatic oven-baked minced beef 'burgers', stuffed with cheese and topped with tomato relish
allItems.description: A popular Greek dish of seasoned minced beef patties (biftekia) that are stuffed with cheese (often feta or a melting cheese like kasseri), then oven-baked or grilled. Typically served with a fresh tomato relish or sauce.
allItems.preparationNotes: Seasoned beef patties stuffed with cheese, baked or grilled, and served with tomato relish. Please inquire if breadcrumbs or egg are used.
allItems.customerGuidance: Flavorful Greek-style beef patties with a melted cheese center.

allItems.name: Psari Plaki - Oven-baked fish fillet topped with fresh tomato slices, onion, and fresh herbs
allItems.description: A traditional Greek baked fish dish. Psari Plaki features fish fillets (often a firm white fish like cod, snapper, or porgy) baked with a generous topping of sliced tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil, and fresh herbs like parsley and oregano.
allItems.preparationNotes: Fish fillets baked with a savory topping of tomatoes, onions, and herbs. A light and flavorful dish.
allItems.customerGuidance: Delicate baked fish with fresh Mediterranean flavors.

allItems.name: Brizola Solomou - Grilled salmon steaks with fresh herbs, lemon, and evoo
allItems.description: Grilled salmon steaks (Brizola Solomou) prepared in a classic Greek style, seasoned with fresh herbs (like oregano, thyme, or dill), fresh lemon juice, and extra virgin olive oil (EVOO).
allItems.preparationNotes: Salmon steaks grilled and seasoned with lemon, olive oil, and fresh Greek herbs.
allItems.customerGuidance: Healthy and delicious grilled salmon with classic Greek seasonings.

allItems.name: Bakaliaros Plaki - Oven-baked Cod fish fillet topped with fresh tomato slices, onion, and fresh herbs
allItems.description: Bakaliaros Plaki is a Greek baked cod dish. Cod fish fillets are topped with sliced fresh tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil, and aromatic fresh herbs like parsley and oregano, then baked until tender and flavorful.
allItems.preparationNotes: Cod fillets baked with a savory topping of tomatoes, onions, and herbs. A light and healthy option.
allItems.customerGuidance: Tender baked cod with fresh tomato and herb topping.

allItems.name: Aginares Ala Polita - Vegan option - Artichoke hearts braised with potatoes and carrots and finished with a creamy egg-lemon sauce and fresh dill
allItems.description: A traditional Greek vegan dish (Aginares A La Polita) featuring tender artichoke hearts braised with potatoes, carrots, onions, and abundant fresh dill in a light, lemony olive oil broth. The 'creamy egg-lemon sauce' mentioned in the name for this vegan option is prepared using plant-based ingredients to achieve creaminess, or refers to the lemony broth itself, without actual egg or dairy.
allItems.preparationNotes: A hearty vegan stew of artichokes, potatoes, and carrots in a lemony dill sauce. The dish is confirmed vegan, any 'creamy sauce' effect is achieved without animal products.
allItems.customerGuidance: A flavorful and satisfying vegan Greek stew with artichokes and vegetables.

allItems.name: Gemista - Vegan Oven-baked stuffed tomatoes and peppers with rice, and fresh herbs
allItems.description: Gemista (or Yemista) are traditional Greek vegetables, typically tomatoes and bell peppers, hollowed out and stuffed with a flavorful mixture of rice, onions, fresh herbs like parsley and mint, and sometimes pine nuts or currants, then baked until tender in olive oil.
allItems.preparationNotes: Oven-baked tomatoes and peppers stuffed with herbed rice. A classic vegan Greek dish. Some recipes include pine nuts; please confirm if nut allergies are a concern.
allItems.customerGuidance: Flavorful rice-stuffed vegetables, a taste of Greek summer. (Values per 1 large stuffed vegetable).

allItems.name: Roasted Lemon Potatoes with oregano
allItems.description: Greek-style roasted potatoes that are crispy on the outside and fluffy inside, infused with the bright flavors of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and oregano.
allItems.preparationNotes: Potatoes roasted with lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and oregano until tender and golden.
allItems.customerGuidance: Tangy and herbaceous Greek-style roasted lemon potatoes.

allItems.name: Spanakopita - House made phyllo dough pouches stuffed with spinach, greens, herbs, and feta cheese
allItems.description: A classic Greek savory pie or individual pouches made with flaky, house-made phyllo dough, filled with a mixture of spinach, various greens (like chard or leeks), fresh herbs (dill, parsley), and tangy feta cheese.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (feta cheese, butter if used in phyllo)
CONTAINS_EGG (if used as binder in filling)
allItems.preparationNotes: Savory spinach and feta pie in flaky phyllo pastry. Contains wheat and dairy. Please inquire if egg is used in the filling.
allItems.customerGuidance: Crispy, flaky, and flavorful spinach and feta phyllo pie. (Values per typical triangular portion).

allItems.name: Kritharaki - Orzo pasta baked in the oven. A pasta side dish choice with any main
allItems.description: Kritharaki, also known as orzo, is a small, rice-shaped pasta. In this Greek preparation, it's typically baked in the oven, often with tomato sauce, broth, onions, and herbs, resulting in a flavorful and tender side dish.
allItems.preparationNotes: Orzo pasta baked until tender, often in a light tomato-herb sauce. Confirm if chicken broth or cheese is used if vegan/dairy-free is required.
allItems.customerGuidance: Flavorful baked orzo pasta, a classic Greek side. (Values per 1 cup serving).

allItems.name: Fasolakia (Greek green beans stewed with tomatoes)
allItems.description: A traditional Greek vegetarian dish (Fasolakia Lathera) where fresh green beans are braised in olive oil with ripe tomatoes, onions, garlic, potatoes (often), and herbs like parsley or dill until very tender.
allItems.category: Main Course - Vegetarian / Vegan / Side Dish
allItems.preparationNotes: Green beans and often potatoes slow-cooked in a rich tomato and olive oil sauce.
allItems.customerGuidance: Comforting Greek stewed green beans in a savory tomato and olive oil base.

allItems.name: Gigandes Plaki - Oven baked lima beans in a herbaceous tomato sauce
allItems.description: Gigandes Plaki are giant dried white lima beans (Gigantes beans) baked in a rich, herbaceous tomato sauce with onions, garlic, olive oil, and plenty of fresh herbs like dill, parsley, and oregano. A hearty and flavorful vegetarian Greek classic.
allItems.preparationNotes: Large lima beans baked in a savory tomato and herb sauce. A staple of Greek cuisine.
allItems.customerGuidance: Hearty and delicious oven-baked giant lima beans.

allItems.name: Tyrokroketes - A blend of three Greek cheeses rolled into delightful tangy balls and coated with sesame seeds
allItems.description: Tyrokroketes are Greek cheese croquettes. They are made from a blend of tangy and melty Greek cheeses (often feta, kefalotyri, graviera), sometimes with a hint of spice or herbs, rolled into balls, coated (this version specifies sesame seeds, traditionally often breadcrumbs), and fried until golden and crispy.
allItems.preparationNotes: Fried cheese balls made with a blend of Greek cheeses and coated in sesame seeds. Contains dairy, egg, wheat, and sesame.
allItems.customerGuidance: Crispy, tangy, and irresistible Greek cheese balls with sesame. (Values per ball).

allItems.name: Octapodi - Spanish octopus slowly braised and served simply with lemon juice, EVOO, and fresh oregano
allItems.description: Tender Spanish octopus, slowly braised to perfection, then often finished on the grill for a slight char. Served in a classic Greek style, dressed simply with fresh lemon juice, extra virgin olive oil (EVOO), and fresh oregano.
allItems.preparationNotes: Octopus braised until tender, then typically grilled and dressed with lemon, olive oil, and oregano.
allItems.customerGuidance: Tender, flavorful braised and grilled octopus, a Greek delicacy. (Values per 100g serving).

allItems.name: Dolmades - Grape leaves stuffed with rice and fresh herbs
allItems.description: Dolmades (or Dolmadakia Yialantzi if meatless) are tender grape leaves stuffed with a savory mixture of rice, onions, and copious fresh herbs like parsley, mint, and dill. They are gently simmered in a lemony broth with olive oil.
allItems.preparationNotes: Grape leaves stuffed with herbed rice. A classic vegan Greek meze. Check if pine nuts are included.
allItems.customerGuidance: Tender, flavorful rice-stuffed grape leaves. (Values per dolma).

allItems.name: Saganaki Cheese - Cheese is deep fried to make a crispy outside, with a melty gooey inside. Flambeed tableside! (Family style only)
allItems.description: A spectacular Greek appetizer where a firm, salty Greek cheese (like Kefalotyri, Kefalograviera, or Kasseri) is pan-fried or deep-fried until it has a crispy golden-brown crust and a molten, gooey interior. It is famously flambéed tableside with brandy or ouzo, and a squeeze of lemon is added to douse the flames.
allItems.preparationNotes: Fried Greek cheese, flambéed tableside. Contains dairy and wheat. Alcohol is used in flambé.
allItems.customerGuidance: Opa! Crispy, melty fried cheese with a tableside flambé. (Family style only).

allItems.name: Greek Rice Pilaf with fresh herbs
allItems.description: A savory Greek rice pilaf, typically made with long-grain rice sautéed with onions and garlic, then simmered in broth and seasoned with fresh herbs like parsley, dill, and sometimes lemon juice.
allItems.preparationNotes: Flavorful rice pilaf cooked with broth and fresh Greek herbs.
allItems.customerGuidance: Aromatic and herby Greek-style rice pilaf.

allItems.name: Baked Vegetables - Briam - Thinly sliced vegetable medley, seasoned and baked till lightly charred
allItems.description: Briam is a traditional Greek roasted vegetable dish. It consists of a medley of summer vegetables, such as potatoes, zucchini, eggplant, tomatoes, and onions, thinly sliced or chunked, generously drizzled with olive oil, seasoned with herbs (especially oregano), and baked until tender and slightly charred.
allItems.preparationNotes: A hearty medley of roasted Mediterranean vegetables baked in olive oil and herbs.
allItems.customerGuidance: Deliciously roasted Greek vegetable medley, simple and flavorful.

allItems.name: Salata Horiatiki - A mix of tomatoes, cucumber, onion, green pepper, feta, and olives, dressed with oil and vinegar
allItems.description: Horiatiki Salata, or Greek Village Salad, is a rustic and refreshing salad featuring chunks of ripe tomatoes, crisp cucumber, sliced red onion, green bell pepper, Kalamata olives, and a generous slab or crumbles of feta cheese. It's dressed simply with quality extra virgin olive oil, a splash of red wine vinegar, and a sprinkle of dried oregano.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (red wine vinegar, olives may contain)
allItems.preparationNotes: The classic Greek salad with fresh vegetables, olives, feta, and a simple oil/vinegar dressing.
allItems.customerGuidance: A truly authentic and refreshing Greek village salad.

allItems.name: Lahanosalata (Greek Coleslaw) - Green and red shredded cabbage, grated carrots, olive oil and lemon juice
allItems.description: Lahanosalata is a simple and refreshing Greek cabbage salad, akin to a light coleslaw but typically without mayonnaise. It features finely shredded green and/or red cabbage, often with grated carrots, dressed with extra virgin olive oil and fresh lemon juice, and sometimes includes herbs like dill or parsley.
allItems.preparationNotes: A light and tangy Greek cabbage salad with an olive oil and lemon dressing.
allItems.customerGuidance: Crisp and refreshing Greek-style coleslaw.

allItems.name: Maroulosalata (Greek Romaine Salad) - Shredded romaine lettuce, scallions, mixed herbs, olive oil, lemon juice
allItems.description: Maroulosalata is a delicate and refreshing Greek salad made with finely shredded romaine lettuce, fresh scallions (spring onions), and an abundance of fresh dill and sometimes other mixed herbs. It's dressed very simply with extra virgin olive oil and fresh lemon juice.
allItems.preparationNotes: A light and refreshing salad of shredded romaine, scallions, and fresh herbs with a lemon-oil dressing.
allItems.customerGuidance: Delicate Greek romaine salad with fresh herbs and a zesty dressing.

allItems.name: Patatosalata - Warm potato salad with sliced red onions, Kalamata olives, parsley and extra virgin olive oil
allItems.description: A Greek-style potato salad (Patatosalata) typically served warm or at room temperature. It features boiled or steamed potatoes tossed with sliced red onions, Kalamata olives, fresh parsley, and a generous dressing of extra virgin olive oil and often lemon juice or red wine vinegar. Unlike American potato salad, it does not usually contain mayonnaise.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if vinegar or some olives used)
allItems.preparationNotes: Warm potato salad with red onions, olives, parsley, and an olive oil based dressing.
allItems.customerGuidance: Hearty and flavorful Greek potato salad, served warm.

allItems.name: Dakos Bread Salad - Fresh tomatoes, barley rusks, feta, capers, onion, oregano, and basil
allItems.description: Dakos (or Ntakos) is a traditional Cretan salad or meze. It features a base of Paximadia (hard barley rusks) that are lightly moistened, then topped with grated or chopped fresh tomatoes, crumbled feta or mizithra cheese, capers, red onion, olives (often), and fresh herbs like oregano and basil, all drizzled with extra virgin olive oil.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (barley rusks often contain wheat flour as well)
allItems.preparationNotes: A Cretan salad built on barley rusks, topped with tomatoes, feta, and herbs. Contains gluten and dairy.
allItems.customerGuidance: A hearty and flavorful Cretan bread salad with fresh toppings.

allItems.name: Fresh Garden Salad with a choice of vegan dressings
allItems.description: A crisp salad of mixed fresh greens and assorted garden vegetables like tomatoes, cucumbers, carrots, and red onions, served with a selection of vegan dressing options.
allergenAlerts: ALLERGENS_DEPEND_ON_DRESSING_CHOICE (e.g., soy, nuts, sesame in some vegan dressings - please verify)
allItems.preparationNotes: A simple mix of fresh greens and vegetables, served with vegan dressing choices.
allItems.customerGuidance: A classic fresh garden salad with a variety of vegan dressings available. (Nutritional values exclude dressing)

allItems.name: Tabouli - Chopped parsley, cous-cous, tomato, cucumber, mint, red onion and lemon-tahini dressing
allItems.description: A refreshing Middle Eastern-inspired salad made with finely chopped parsley as the primary ingredient, mixed with couscous (as specified, though traditional tabouli uses bulgur), diced tomatoes, cucumber, fresh mint, and red onion. This version is tossed in a creamy and zesty lemon-tahini dressing.
allItems.preparationNotes: A vibrant parsley and couscous salad (note: couscous instead of traditional bulgur) with a creamy lemon-tahini dressing. Contains wheat and sesame.
allItems.customerGuidance: A refreshing herb-packed salad with couscous and lemon-tahini dressing.

allItems.name: Tzatziki - Yogurt, garlic, cucumber, herbs
allItems.description: A classic Greek and Middle Eastern dip or sauce made from strained yogurt, grated or finely diced cucumber, minced garlic, olive oil, and fresh herbs such as dill or mint. Often includes lemon juice.
allItems.preparationNotes: A refreshing yogurt and cucumber dip. Contains dairy.
allItems.customerGuidance: Cool, creamy, and refreshing Greek yogurt dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

allItems.name: Hummus - Chickpea, tahini, lemon
allItems.description: A smooth and creamy Middle Eastern dip or spread made from cooked, mashed chickpeas blended with tahini (sesame paste), fresh lemon juice, and garlic. Often garnished with olive oil and paprika or parsley.
allItems.preparationNotes: Classic chickpea and tahini dip. Contains sesame.
allItems.customerGuidance: Creamy and savory chickpea dip with tahini and lemon. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

allItems.name: Melitzanosalata - Eggplant, garlic, tahini, cilantro
allItems.description: A flavorful roasted eggplant dip. This version combines smoky roasted eggplant pulp with garlic, tahini for added creaminess, fresh cilantro for a distinct herbal note, lemon juice, and olive oil.
allItems.preparationNotes: Smoky roasted eggplant dip with tahini and fresh cilantro. Contains sesame.
allItems.customerGuidance: Smoky eggplant dip with a creamy texture from tahini and a fresh cilantro twist. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

allItems.name: Spicy Feta - Feta cheese puree with spicy peppers
allItems.description: Known as Tirokafteri in Greek, this is a zesty and creamy dip made from puréed or crumbled feta cheese blended with spicy peppers (such as hot chili peppers or roasted red peppers with a kick), olive oil, and sometimes a touch of yogurt or red wine vinegar.
allItems.preparationNotes: A creamy and spicy feta cheese dip. Contains dairy.
allItems.customerGuidance: Creamy, tangy, and spicy feta cheese spread. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

allItems.name: Taramasalata - Cod roe, potato, extra virgin olive oil
allItems.description: A traditional Greek meze dip made from tarama (salted and cured fish roe, typically from cod, carp, or mullet), emulsified with either bread or potato, extra virgin olive oil, and lemon juice to create a creamy, savory spread.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (if bread is used as emulsifier instead of potato, please inquire)
allItems.preparationNotes: A creamy dip made from cured fish roe. This version uses potato. Confirm if bread is used as an alternative for gluten concerns.
allItems.customerGuidance: Unique and savory cured fish roe dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

allItems.name: Beet Hummus - Roasted beets, chickpea, garlic, tahini, evoo
allItems.description: A vibrant and earthy variation of traditional hummus, where roasted beets are blended with chickpeas, tahini (sesame paste), garlic, lemon juice, and extra virgin olive oil (EVOO).
allItems.preparationNotes: A colorful and flavorful hummus variant with roasted beets. Contains sesame.
allItems.customerGuidance: Vibrant beet hummus, both earthy and tangy. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

mains.title: Main Courses
mains.description: Main Courses for A Taste of Greece

items.name: Papoutsakia - Classic moussaka in individual hollowed eggplant shells with seasoned ground beef and topped with creamy bechamel
items.description: A traditional Greek dish, 'Papoutsakia' means 'little shoes'. It consists of baked eggplant halves stuffed with a savory ground meat (typically beef or lamb) and tomato sauce, then topped with a creamy béchamel sauce and baked until golden.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (milk, butter, cheese in béchamel and topping)
items.preparationNotes: Baked stuffed eggplants with seasoned ground meat and a rich béchamel topping, similar to individual moussakas.
items.customerGuidance: Delicious Greek 'little shoes' – savory meat-stuffed eggplants topped with creamy béchamel.

items.name: Soutzoukakia - Plump oblong-shaped meatballs are packed with loads of aromatics and fresh herbs, smothered in a cinnamon wine-enhanced tomato sauce
items.description: Soutzoukakia Smyrneika are Greek baked meatballs from Smyrna, characterized by their oblong shape and rich, aromatic tomato sauce flavored with cumin, cinnamon, and wine.
items.preparationNotes: Aromatic, oblong meatballs baked in a rich tomato sauce spiced with cumin and cinnamon.
items.customerGuidance: Flavorful Greek meatballs in a unique cinnamon and wine-infused tomato sauce.

items.name: Kokinisto - Boneless short rib slowly cooked in cinnamon-scented tomato sauce
items.description: A traditional Greek comfort dish, Kokinisto features tender boneless beef short ribs braised slowly in a rich, aromatic tomato sauce, characteristically scented with cinnamon, cloves, and other warm spices.
items.preparationNotes: Beef short ribs slow-cooked until meltingly tender in a cinnamon-spiced tomato sauce. Typically served over rice, pasta, or potatoes.
items.customerGuidance: Tender, aromatic short ribs in a classic Greek cinnamon-tomato sauce.

items.name: Kleftiko - (Family style only) Boldly seasoned lamb roast that cooks with new potatoes, celery, and carrots, low and slow for 6 hours, in a parchment paper pouch
items.description: A traditional Greek celebratory lamb dish. Lamb (often leg or shoulder) is boldly seasoned with garlic, oregano, and lemon, then slow-roasted for hours in a parchment paper pouch along with new potatoes, celery, and carrots, sealing in all the juices and flavors.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (potentially, if feta cheese is included, please inquire)
items.preparationNotes: Lamb slow-roasted in parchment paper with potatoes and vegetables for exceptional tenderness. Served family style. Inquire if feta cheese is part of this specific recipe.
suitableForDiets: PALEO_FRIENDLY (if no cheese and specific preparation)
items.customerGuidance: Succulent, slow-cooked lamb and vegetables, bursting with flavor. Perfect for sharing.

items.name: Pastitsio - Classic baked pasta dish with cinnamon-scented ground meat and creamy béchamel sauce
items.description: A beloved Greek baked pasta casserole. Pastitsio features layers of long tubular pasta (like bucatini or special Pastitsio pasta), a rich, cinnamon-spiced ground meat sauce (typically beef or a mix), and is topped with a thick, creamy béchamel sauce and often a sprinkle of cheese.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if wine is used in meat sauce)
items.preparationNotes: A hearty layered baked pasta dish with spiced meat sauce and creamy béchamel. Contains wheat, dairy, and egg.
items.customerGuidance: The ultimate Greek comfort food – rich, creamy, and satisfying.

items.name: Kotopoulo lemonato - Aromatic and lemony baked chicken with fresh herbs
items.description: A classic Greek dish of tender chicken pieces (often bone-in, skin-on) baked until golden with a vibrant, aromatic sauce of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, and other fresh herbs. Potatoes are often roasted alongside the chicken.
items.preparationNotes: Chicken baked with a zesty lemon, garlic, and herb sauce. Often served with roasted potatoes cooked in the same pan.
suitableForDiets: PALEO_FRIENDLY (if no/minimal added sugar in broth if used)
items.customerGuidance: Bright, flavorful, and tender lemon-herb baked chicken.

items.name: Paidakia - These Greek lamb chops are marinated in a mix of olive oil, lemon juice, garlic and oregano and grilled to perfection
items.description: Paidakia are succulent Greek-style lamb chops, typically marinated in a classic mixture of extra virgin olive oil, fresh lemon juice, minced garlic, and dried oregano, then grilled over high heat to achieve a flavorful char and tender interior.
items.preparationNotes: Lamb chops marinated in olive oil, lemon, garlic, and oregano, then grilled. Cooked to order.
items.customerGuidance: Classic Greek grilled lamb chops – intensely flavorful and tender.

items.name: Kotsi Arni - Slowly roasted lamb shank with tomato, herbs and robust spices such as cinnamon and clove
items.description: A hearty Greek dish of lamb shanks (Kotsi Arni) slowly roasted or braised until fall-off-the-bone tender in a rich sauce, often tomato-based, and flavored with herbs and robust warm spices like cinnamon and cloves.
items.preparationNotes: Lamb shanks slow-cooked in a tomato and spice-infused sauce until exceptionally tender. Often served with orzo, mashed potatoes, or rice.
items.customerGuidance: Fork-tender lamb shanks in a rich, aromatic Greek-style sauce.

items.name: Bifteki Gemisto - Aromatic oven-baked minced beef 'burgers', stuffed with cheese and topped with tomato relish
items.description: A popular Greek dish of seasoned minced beef patties (biftekia) that are stuffed with cheese (often feta or a melting cheese like kasseri), then oven-baked or grilled. Typically served with a fresh tomato relish or sauce.
items.preparationNotes: Seasoned beef patties stuffed with cheese, baked or grilled, and served with tomato relish. Please inquire if breadcrumbs or egg are used.
items.customerGuidance: Flavorful Greek-style beef patties with a melted cheese center.

items.name: Psari Plaki - Oven-baked fish fillet topped with fresh tomato slices, onion, and fresh herbs
items.description: A traditional Greek baked fish dish. Psari Plaki features fish fillets (often a firm white fish like cod, snapper, or porgy) baked with a generous topping of sliced tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil, and fresh herbs like parsley and oregano.
items.preparationNotes: Fish fillets baked with a savory topping of tomatoes, onions, and herbs. A light and flavorful dish.
items.customerGuidance: Delicate baked fish with fresh Mediterranean flavors.

items.name: Brizola Solomou - Grilled salmon steaks with fresh herbs, lemon, and evoo
items.description: Grilled salmon steaks (Brizola Solomou) prepared in a classic Greek style, seasoned with fresh herbs (like oregano, thyme, or dill), fresh lemon juice, and extra virgin olive oil (EVOO).
items.preparationNotes: Salmon steaks grilled and seasoned with lemon, olive oil, and fresh Greek herbs.
items.customerGuidance: Healthy and delicious grilled salmon with classic Greek seasonings.

items.name: Bakaliaros Plaki - Oven-baked Cod fish fillet topped with fresh tomato slices, onion, and fresh herbs
items.description: Bakaliaros Plaki is a Greek baked cod dish. Cod fish fillets are topped with sliced fresh tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil, and aromatic fresh herbs like parsley and oregano, then baked until tender and flavorful.
items.preparationNotes: Cod fillets baked with a savory topping of tomatoes, onions, and herbs. A light and healthy option.
items.customerGuidance: Tender baked cod with fresh tomato and herb topping.

items.name: Aginares Ala Polita - Vegan option - Artichoke hearts braised with potatoes and carrots and finished with a creamy egg-lemon sauce and fresh dill
items.description: A traditional Greek vegan dish (Aginares A La Polita) featuring tender artichoke hearts braised with potatoes, carrots, onions, and abundant fresh dill in a light, lemony olive oil broth. The 'creamy egg-lemon sauce' mentioned in the name for this vegan option is prepared using plant-based ingredients to achieve creaminess, or refers to the lemony broth itself, without actual egg or dairy.
items.preparationNotes: A hearty vegan stew of artichokes, potatoes, and carrots in a lemony dill sauce. The dish is confirmed vegan, any 'creamy sauce' effect is achieved without animal products.
items.customerGuidance: A flavorful and satisfying vegan Greek stew with artichokes and vegetables.

items.name: Gemista - Vegan Oven-baked stuffed tomatoes and peppers with rice, and fresh herbs
items.description: Gemista (or Yemista) are traditional Greek vegetables, typically tomatoes and bell peppers, hollowed out and stuffed with a flavorful mixture of rice, onions, fresh herbs like parsley and mint, and sometimes pine nuts or currants, then baked until tender in olive oil.
items.preparationNotes: Oven-baked tomatoes and peppers stuffed with herbed rice. A classic vegan Greek dish. Some recipes include pine nuts; please confirm if nut allergies are a concern.
items.customerGuidance: Flavorful rice-stuffed vegetables, a taste of Greek summer. (Values per 1 large stuffed vegetable).

sides.title: Side Dishes
sides.description: Side Dishes for A Taste of Greece

items.name: Roasted Lemon Potatoes with oregano
items.description: Greek-style roasted potatoes that are crispy on the outside and fluffy inside, infused with the bright flavors of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and oregano.
items.preparationNotes: Potatoes roasted with lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and oregano until tender and golden.
items.customerGuidance: Tangy and herbaceous Greek-style roasted lemon potatoes.

items.name: Spanakopita - House made phyllo dough pouches stuffed with spinach, greens, herbs, and feta cheese
items.description: A classic Greek savory pie or individual pouches made with flaky, house-made phyllo dough, filled with a mixture of spinach, various greens (like chard or leeks), fresh herbs (dill, parsley), and tangy feta cheese.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (feta cheese, butter if used in phyllo)
CONTAINS_EGG (if used as binder in filling)
items.preparationNotes: Savory spinach and feta pie in flaky phyllo pastry. Contains wheat and dairy. Please inquire if egg is used in the filling.
items.customerGuidance: Crispy, flaky, and flavorful spinach and feta phyllo pie. (Values per typical triangular portion).

items.name: Kritharaki - Orzo pasta baked in the oven. A pasta side dish choice with any main
items.description: Kritharaki, also known as orzo, is a small, rice-shaped pasta. In this Greek preparation, it's typically baked in the oven, often with tomato sauce, broth, onions, and herbs, resulting in a flavorful and tender side dish.
items.preparationNotes: Orzo pasta baked until tender, often in a light tomato-herb sauce. Confirm if chicken broth or cheese is used if vegan/dairy-free is required.
items.customerGuidance: Flavorful baked orzo pasta, a classic Greek side. (Values per 1 cup serving).

items.name: Fasolakia (Greek green beans stewed with tomatoes)
items.description: A traditional Greek vegetarian dish (Fasolakia Lathera) where fresh green beans are braised in olive oil with ripe tomatoes, onions, garlic, potatoes (often), and herbs like parsley or dill until very tender.
items.category: Main Course - Vegetarian / Vegan / Side Dish
items.preparationNotes: Green beans and often potatoes slow-cooked in a rich tomato and olive oil sauce.
items.customerGuidance: Comforting Greek stewed green beans in a savory tomato and olive oil base.

items.name: Gigandes Plaki - Oven baked lima beans in a herbaceous tomato sauce
items.description: Gigandes Plaki are giant dried white lima beans (Gigantes beans) baked in a rich, herbaceous tomato sauce with onions, garlic, olive oil, and plenty of fresh herbs like dill, parsley, and oregano. A hearty and flavorful vegetarian Greek classic.
items.preparationNotes: Large lima beans baked in a savory tomato and herb sauce. A staple of Greek cuisine.
items.customerGuidance: Hearty and delicious oven-baked giant lima beans.

items.name: Tyrokroketes - A blend of three Greek cheeses rolled into delightful tangy balls and coated with sesame seeds
items.description: Tyrokroketes are Greek cheese croquettes. They are made from a blend of tangy and melty Greek cheeses (often feta, kefalotyri, graviera), sometimes with a hint of spice or herbs, rolled into balls, coated (this version specifies sesame seeds, traditionally often breadcrumbs), and fried until golden and crispy.
items.preparationNotes: Fried cheese balls made with a blend of Greek cheeses and coated in sesame seeds. Contains dairy, egg, wheat, and sesame.
items.customerGuidance: Crispy, tangy, and irresistible Greek cheese balls with sesame. (Values per ball).

items.name: Octapodi - Spanish octopus slowly braised and served simply with lemon juice, EVOO, and fresh oregano
items.description: Tender Spanish octopus, slowly braised to perfection, then often finished on the grill for a slight char. Served in a classic Greek style, dressed simply with fresh lemon juice, extra virgin olive oil (EVOO), and fresh oregano.
items.preparationNotes: Octopus braised until tender, then typically grilled and dressed with lemon, olive oil, and oregano.
items.customerGuidance: Tender, flavorful braised and grilled octopus, a Greek delicacy. (Values per 100g serving).

items.name: Dolmades - Grape leaves stuffed with rice and fresh herbs
items.description: Dolmades (or Dolmadakia Yialantzi if meatless) are tender grape leaves stuffed with a savory mixture of rice, onions, and copious fresh herbs like parsley, mint, and dill. They are gently simmered in a lemony broth with olive oil.
items.preparationNotes: Grape leaves stuffed with herbed rice. A classic vegan Greek meze. Check if pine nuts are included.
items.customerGuidance: Tender, flavorful rice-stuffed grape leaves. (Values per dolma).

items.name: Saganaki Cheese - Cheese is deep fried to make a crispy outside, with a melty gooey inside. Flambeed tableside! (Family style only)
items.description: A spectacular Greek appetizer where a firm, salty Greek cheese (like Kefalotyri, Kefalograviera, or Kasseri) is pan-fried or deep-fried until it has a crispy golden-brown crust and a molten, gooey interior. It is famously flambéed tableside with brandy or ouzo, and a squeeze of lemon is added to douse the flames.
items.preparationNotes: Fried Greek cheese, flambéed tableside. Contains dairy and wheat. Alcohol is used in flambé.
items.customerGuidance: Opa! Crispy, melty fried cheese with a tableside flambé. (Family style only).

items.name: Greek Rice Pilaf with fresh herbs
items.description: A savory Greek rice pilaf, typically made with long-grain rice sautéed with onions and garlic, then simmered in broth and seasoned with fresh herbs like parsley, dill, and sometimes lemon juice.
items.preparationNotes: Flavorful rice pilaf cooked with broth and fresh Greek herbs.
items.customerGuidance: Aromatic and herby Greek-style rice pilaf.

items.name: Baked Vegetables - Briam - Thinly sliced vegetable medley, seasoned and baked till lightly charred
items.description: Briam is a traditional Greek roasted vegetable dish. It consists of a medley of summer vegetables, such as potatoes, zucchini, eggplant, tomatoes, and onions, thinly sliced or chunked, generously drizzled with olive oil, seasoned with herbs (especially oregano), and baked until tender and slightly charred.
items.preparationNotes: A hearty medley of roasted Mediterranean vegetables baked in olive oil and herbs.
items.customerGuidance: Deliciously roasted Greek vegetable medley, simple and flavorful.

salads.title: Salads
salads.description: Salads for A Taste of Greece

items.name: Salata Horiatiki - A mix of tomatoes, cucumber, onion, green pepper, feta, and olives, dressed with oil and vinegar
items.description: Horiatiki Salata, or Greek Village Salad, is a rustic and refreshing salad featuring chunks of ripe tomatoes, crisp cucumber, sliced red onion, green bell pepper, Kalamata olives, and a generous slab or crumbles of feta cheese. It's dressed simply with quality extra virgin olive oil, a splash of red wine vinegar, and a sprinkle of dried oregano.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (red wine vinegar, olives may contain)
items.preparationNotes: The classic Greek salad with fresh vegetables, olives, feta, and a simple oil/vinegar dressing.
items.customerGuidance: A truly authentic and refreshing Greek village salad.

items.name: Lahanosalata (Greek Coleslaw) - Green and red shredded cabbage, grated carrots, olive oil and lemon juice
items.description: Lahanosalata is a simple and refreshing Greek cabbage salad, akin to a light coleslaw but typically without mayonnaise. It features finely shredded green and/or red cabbage, often with grated carrots, dressed with extra virgin olive oil and fresh lemon juice, and sometimes includes herbs like dill or parsley.
items.preparationNotes: A light and tangy Greek cabbage salad with an olive oil and lemon dressing.
items.customerGuidance: Crisp and refreshing Greek-style coleslaw.

items.name: Maroulosalata (Greek Romaine Salad) - Shredded romaine lettuce, scallions, mixed herbs, olive oil, lemon juice
items.description: Maroulosalata is a delicate and refreshing Greek salad made with finely shredded romaine lettuce, fresh scallions (spring onions), and an abundance of fresh dill and sometimes other mixed herbs. It's dressed very simply with extra virgin olive oil and fresh lemon juice.
items.preparationNotes: A light and refreshing salad of shredded romaine, scallions, and fresh herbs with a lemon-oil dressing.
items.customerGuidance: Delicate Greek romaine salad with fresh herbs and a zesty dressing.

items.name: Patatosalata - Warm potato salad with sliced red onions, Kalamata olives, parsley and extra virgin olive oil
items.description: A Greek-style potato salad (Patatosalata) typically served warm or at room temperature. It features boiled or steamed potatoes tossed with sliced red onions, Kalamata olives, fresh parsley, and a generous dressing of extra virgin olive oil and often lemon juice or red wine vinegar. Unlike American potato salad, it does not usually contain mayonnaise.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if vinegar or some olives used)
items.preparationNotes: Warm potato salad with red onions, olives, parsley, and an olive oil based dressing.
items.customerGuidance: Hearty and flavorful Greek potato salad, served warm.

items.name: Dakos Bread Salad - Fresh tomatoes, barley rusks, feta, capers, onion, oregano, and basil
items.description: Dakos (or Ntakos) is a traditional Cretan salad or meze. It features a base of Paximadia (hard barley rusks) that are lightly moistened, then topped with grated or chopped fresh tomatoes, crumbled feta or mizithra cheese, capers, red onion, olives (often), and fresh herbs like oregano and basil, all drizzled with extra virgin olive oil.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (barley rusks often contain wheat flour as well)
items.preparationNotes: A Cretan salad built on barley rusks, topped with tomatoes, feta, and herbs. Contains gluten and dairy.
items.customerGuidance: A hearty and flavorful Cretan bread salad with fresh toppings.

items.name: Fresh Garden Salad with a choice of vegan dressings
items.description: A crisp salad of mixed fresh greens and assorted garden vegetables like tomatoes, cucumbers, carrots, and red onions, served with a selection of vegan dressing options.
allergenAlerts: ALLERGENS_DEPEND_ON_DRESSING_CHOICE (e.g., soy, nuts, sesame in some vegan dressings - please verify)
items.preparationNotes: A simple mix of fresh greens and vegetables, served with vegan dressing choices.
items.customerGuidance: A classic fresh garden salad with a variety of vegan dressings available. (Nutritional values exclude dressing)

items.name: Tabouli - Chopped parsley, cous-cous, tomato, cucumber, mint, red onion and lemon-tahini dressing
items.description: A refreshing Middle Eastern-inspired salad made with finely chopped parsley as the primary ingredient, mixed with couscous (as specified, though traditional tabouli uses bulgur), diced tomatoes, cucumber, fresh mint, and red onion. This version is tossed in a creamy and zesty lemon-tahini dressing.
items.preparationNotes: A vibrant parsley and couscous salad (note: couscous instead of traditional bulgur) with a creamy lemon-tahini dressing. Contains wheat and sesame.
items.customerGuidance: A refreshing herb-packed salad with couscous and lemon-tahini dressing.

spreads.description: Spreads for A Taste of Greece

items.description: A classic Greek and Middle Eastern dip or sauce made from strained yogurt, grated or finely diced cucumber, minced garlic, olive oil, and fresh herbs such as dill or mint. Often includes lemon juice.

items.customerGuidance: Cool, creamy, and refreshing Greek yogurt dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

items.customerGuidance: Creamy and savory chickpea dip with tahini and lemon. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

items.description: A flavorful roasted eggplant dip. This version combines smoky roasted eggplant pulp with garlic, tahini for added creaminess, fresh cilantro for a distinct herbal note, lemon juice, and olive oil.
items.preparationNotes: Smoky roasted eggplant dip with tahini and fresh cilantro. Contains sesame.
items.customerGuidance: Smoky eggplant dip with a creamy texture from tahini and a fresh cilantro twist. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

items.name: Spicy Feta - Feta cheese puree with spicy peppers
items.description: Known as Tirokafteri in Greek, this is a zesty and creamy dip made from puréed or crumbled feta cheese blended with spicy peppers (such as hot chili peppers or roasted red peppers with a kick), olive oil, and sometimes a touch of yogurt or red wine vinegar.
items.preparationNotes: A creamy and spicy feta cheese dip. Contains dairy.

items.description: A traditional Greek meze dip made from tarama (salted and cured fish roe, typically from cod, carp, or mullet), emulsified with either bread or potato, extra virgin olive oil, and lemon juice to create a creamy, savory spread.

items.preparationNotes: A creamy dip made from cured fish roe. This version uses potato. Confirm if bread is used as an alternative for gluten concerns.
items.customerGuidance: Unique and savory cured fish roe dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

items.description: A vibrant and earthy variation of traditional hummus, where roasted beets are blended with chickpeas, tahini (sesame paste), garlic, lemon juice, and extra virgin olive oil (EVOO).
items.preparationNotes: A colorful and flavorful hummus variant with roasted beets. Contains sesame.
items.customerGuidance: Vibrant beet hummus, both earthy and tangy. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

allItems.name: Pork Tenderloin
allItems.description: A lean, tender, and flavorful cut of pork, typically roasted, grilled, or pan-seared. Offered as a versatile protein choice, prepared to highlight its natural taste.
allItems.preparationNotes: Simply prepared pork tenderloin. Please inquire about any specific marinades or glazes used for today's preparation.
allItems.customerGuidance: Lean and tender pork tenderloin, a versatile protein choice. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

allItems.name: Chicken Saltimbocca with Prosciutto & Sage
allItems.description: A classic Italian dish featuring pan-seared chicken cutlets topped with prosciutto and fresh sage, typically finished with a pan sauce.
allItems.preparationNotes: Pan-seared with prosciutto and fresh sage.
allItems.customerGuidance: A classic Italian dish that's perfect for protein-focused diners.

allItems.name: Beef Tenderloin
allItems.description: A prime cut of beef known for its exceptional tenderness, typically grilled, roasted, or pan-seared. Offered as a premium protein choice.
allItems.preparationNotes: Simply prepared beef tenderloin. Please inquire about any specific marinades or sauces used today.
allItems.customerGuidance: Exceptionally tender beef tenderloin. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

allItems.name: Beef Flank
allItems.description: A lean and flavorful cut of beef, known for its robust taste. Typically grilled or broiled and often sliced against the grain. Offered as a protein option.
allItems.preparationNotes: Flavorful beef flank steak. Please inquire about any specific marinades used today (e.g., soy sauce in some marinades could add wheat/soy allergens).
allItems.customerGuidance: Lean and flavorful beef flank. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

allItems.name: Lamb
allItems.description: Tender and flavorful lamb, prepared simply (e.g., grilled, roasted) to highlight its distinct taste. Offered as a protein option. Specific cut may vary (e.g., chops, cubed, ground).
allItems.preparationNotes: Simply prepared lamb. Please inquire about the specific cut and any marinades used today.
