items.description: Small steamed balls of crushed durum wheat semolina, traditionally served with a stew spooned on top or as a simple side dish. This refers to plain prepared couscous.
items.preparationNotes: Plain steamed couscous. Contains wheat. Vegan if prepared without butter.
items.customerGuidance: Light and fluffy plain couscous. (Values per 1 cup cooked serving).

items.name: Lebanese Potato Salad
items.description: A refreshing Middle Eastern potato salad, typically made with boiled potatoes, fresh parsley, mint, lemon juice, and olive oil. Unlike many Western versions, it does not contain mayonnaise.
items.preparationNotes: A light and herb-filled potato salad with a lemon-oil dressing. No mayonnaise.
items.customerGuidance: Refreshing Lebanese-style potato salad with fresh herbs.

items.name: Greek Village Salad (Horiatiki) with vegan feta alternative
items.description: A traditional Greek salad (Horiatiki) made with chunks of tomatoes, cucumbers, red onion, Kalamata olives, and bell peppers, typically dressed with olive oil and oregano. This version includes a vegan feta cheese alternative.
items.preparationNotes: A rustic Greek salad with tomatoes, cucumbers, olives, and vegan feta.
items.customerGuidance: Authentic Greek village salad with fresh vegetables and a dairy-free feta alternative.

items.name: Tomato - Cucumber salad
items.description: A simple and refreshing salad made with diced or sliced tomatoes and cucumbers, often with red onion, and a light dressing of olive oil, vinegar or lemon juice, and fresh herbs like parsley or dill.
items.preparationNotes: A light and crisp salad of tomatoes and cucumbers with a simple dressing.
items.customerGuidance: Simple, crisp, and refreshing tomato and cucumber salad.

items.name: Caprese pasta salad
items.description: A delightful pasta salad inspired by the classic Caprese salad, featuring cooked pasta (often rotini or farfalle) tossed with fresh mozzarella pearls or cubes, cherry or grape tomatoes (often halved), fresh basil leaves, and a light dressing of olive oil and balsamic glaze or vinaigrette.
items.preparationNotes: Pasta salad with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil. Contains wheat and dairy.
items.customerGuidance: Fresh and flavorful Caprese-inspired pasta salad.

items.name: Caesar
items.description: A classic salad of romaine lettuce and croutons dressed with lemon juice (or lime), olive oil, egg, Worcestershire sauce, anchovies, garlic, Dijon mustard, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper.
items.preparationNotes: Traditionally made with romaine lettuce and a creamy dressing containing anchovies and Parmesan cheese. Croutons add a crunchy texture.
items.customerGuidance: A rich and savory classic salad. Not vegetarian due to anchovies in dressing.

items.name: Fresh Garden Salad with a choice of vegan dressings
items.description: A crisp salad of mixed fresh greens and assorted garden vegetables like tomatoes, cucumbers, carrots, and red onions, served with a selection of vegan dressing options.
allergenAlerts: ALLERGENS_DEPEND_ON_DRESSING_CHOICE (e.g., soy, nuts, sesame in some vegan dressings - please verify)
items.preparationNotes: A simple mix of fresh greens and vegetables, served with vegan dressing choices.
items.customerGuidance: A classic fresh garden salad with a variety of vegan dressings available. (Nutritional values exclude dressing)

items.name: Tzatziki - Yogurt, garlic, cucumber, herbs
items.description: A classic Greek and Middle Eastern dip or sauce made from strained yogurt, grated or finely diced cucumber, minced garlic, olive oil, and fresh herbs such as dill or mint. Often includes lemon juice.
items.preparationNotes: A refreshing yogurt and cucumber dip. Contains dairy.
items.customerGuidance: Cool, creamy, and refreshing Greek yogurt dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

items.name: Hummus
items.description: A popular Middle Eastern dip or spread made from cooked, mashed chickpeas blended with tahini, lemon juice, and garlic. Typically served with pita bread or vegetables.
items.preparationNotes: A smooth, creamy blend of chickpeas and tahini, seasoned with lemon and garlic. Naturally gluten-free and vegan. Contains sesame from tahini.
items.customerGuidance: Creamy, flavorful, and versatile hummus, a healthy and popular choice.

items.name: Baba Ghanoush
items.description: A Levantine appetizer consisting of finely chopped roasted eggplant, olive oil, lemon juice, various seasonings, and tahini. The eggplant is typically baked or broiled over an open flame before peeling, so that the pulp is soft and has a smoky taste.
items.preparationNotes: Smoky and creamy roasted eggplant dip with tahini. Contains sesame.
items.customerGuidance: Rich, smoky, and creamy eggplant dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

items.name: Spicy Feta - Feta cheese puree with spicy peppers
items.description: Known as Tirokafteri in Greek, this is a zesty and creamy dip made from puréed or crumbled feta cheese blended with spicy peppers (such as hot chili peppers or roasted red peppers with a kick), olive oil, and sometimes a touch of yogurt or red wine vinegar.
items.preparationNotes: A creamy and spicy feta cheese dip. Contains dairy.
items.customerGuidance: Creamy, tangy, and spicy feta cheese spread. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

items.name: Taramasalata - Cod roe, potato, extra virgin olive oil
items.description: A traditional Greek meze dip made from tarama (salted and cured fish roe, typically from cod, carp, or mullet), emulsified with either bread or potato, extra virgin olive oil, and lemon juice to create a creamy, savory spread.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (if bread is used as emulsifier instead of potato, please inquire)
items.preparationNotes: A creamy dip made from cured fish roe. This version uses potato. Confirm if bread is used as an alternative for gluten concerns.
items.customerGuidance: Unique and savory cured fish roe dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

items.name: Muhammara
items.description: A rich, savory, and slightly tangy Middle Eastern dip made primarily from roasted red peppers, ground walnuts, breadcrumbs, and pomegranate molasses, often seasoned with garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, and spices like cumin and red pepper flakes.
items.preparationNotes: A robust dip with a unique sweet, tangy, nutty, and slightly spicy flavor profile. Contains walnuts and wheat.
items.customerGuidance: Savory roasted red pepper and walnut dip with a hint of pomegranate. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

items.name: Lebanese garlic dip
items.description: Toum is a potent and cloud-like Lebanese garlic dip, resembling mayonnaise in texture but entirely egg-free. It's a traditional emulsion of fresh garlic, a neutral oil (like sunflower or canola), lemon juice, and salt, whipped to a fluffy consistency.
items.preparationNotes: An intensely garlicky and fluffy dip, naturally vegan. Known for its strong garlic punch.
suitableForDiets: KETO_FRIENDLY (due to high fat, low carb)
items.customerGuidance: Intensely flavorful and creamy Lebanese garlic whip. A little goes a long way! (Values per 1 tbsp serving).
